headline: Assessing Ecolab (ECL) Valuation After Strong Q1 Results And New Bioprocessing Expansion
summary: Ecolab (ECL) is back in focus after reporting first quarter results with higher revenue and earnings, issuing 2026 sales guidance, and expanding its life sciences footprint through a new bioprocessing lab in South Korea. See our latest analysis for Ecolab. Despite solid first quarter figures, new bioprocessing capacity in Korea and the planned CoolIT Systems acquisition, momentum has cooled recently, with the stock down 16.2% on a 90 day share price return while the 3 year total shareholder...

headline: Ecolab Delivers Strong Performance and Impact
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., May 12, 2026--The world is entering a period of historic growth, complexity and opportunity. As artificial intelligence reshapes industries and demand for energy, food and water accelerates, how companies grow next will matter as much as how fast they grow.

headline: Ecolab Inc. (ECL) Declares Regular Cash Dividend of $0.37 Per Share
summary: Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) is one of the 10 Best Industrial Stocks Benefiting from the Data Center Boom. On May 7, the company declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.73 per common share. The dividend covers shareholders of record at the close of business on June 16, 2026, and will be paid on July 15, […]
